backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the backend for a crystal/tarot shop, including access-controlled CRUD for products, tarot services, user profiles, and appointments with admin/user role enforcement.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented features with their associated files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels for the Mystic Moon with Ishita project.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summary document describing the purpose and key details of each frontend source file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors, borders, charts, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app with SEO meta tags and page title for the Mystic Moon with Ishita spiritual services site.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing selected service state, smooth-scroll navigation to the appointment section, and rendering all page sections in order with shared callbacks.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About section component displaying Ishita's portrait, bio text, and three stat badges (Experience, Clients, Confidential) with steel-blue crystal-moon styling.
frontend/src/components/Appointment.tsx: Multi-step appointment booking form (form → payment → confirmation) that collects user details, shows a UPI payment ID, and submits the appointment via the `useCreateAppointment` hook.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying brand info, service/product lists, Instagram link, and a 'Book a Reading' CTA button that scrolls to the appointment section.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header with a logo image (and SVG fallback) that scrolls the page to the top when clicked.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Hero section with animated logo, tagline, star rating, and CTA buttons that scroll to the services and products sections.
frontend/src/components/ImportantNotes.t: Static informational section displaying four policy notes (delivery time, format, restrictions, confidentiality) in a responsive grid of cards.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Card component for a single crystal-shop product, showing its image (with emoji fallback), type badge, trending badge, price, and an Instagram order link.
frontend/src/components/ProductCatalog.t: Renders a filterable product catalog section with tabs for All, Crystals, Bracelets, and Pendulums, displaying products in a responsive grid using ProductCard components.
frontend/src/components/Reviews.tsx: Displays a testimonials section with a grid of 5-star customer review cards sourced from the reviews data file, showing reviewer name, date, text, and category badge.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Renders a tarot/spiritual services catalog with category cards featuring a hand-pentacle SVG illustration, service listings with prices, and individual 'Book This' buttons that trigger a booking flow.
Displays a gallery grid of service category images with hover overlays and a fallback SVG card for broken images, plus an Instagram follow button.
frontend/src/data/products.ts: Defines the LocalProduct interface and exports a static array of crystal, bracelet, and pendulum products with names, descriptions, prices, image URLs, and trending flags.
frontend/src/data/reviews.ts: Defines the Review interface and exports a static array of customer reviews categorized as either 'Tarot Session' or 'Crystal Purchase', each with name, text, and date.
frontend/src/data/serviceGalleryImages.t: Defines a typed array of service gallery images mapping five tarot service categories (mini readings, love, career, deep, premium) to their banner image paths and display labels.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates all dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication, exposing login/logout functions and status flags via React context.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for reading and mutating backend data (products, tarot services, appointments) by wrapping actor calls with useQuery and useMutation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, and defines a logo-inspired blue-crystal-moon CSS custom property palette for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/utils/pricing.ts: Provides two utility functions: calculateFinalPrice adds a fixed ₹400 markup to a base price, and formatPrice formats a number as an Indian Rupee string.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback for sensitive values like admin tokens.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with brand-specific colors (crystal, moon, sparkle), custom fonts (Cinzel, Cormorant Garamond, Lato), shadows, gradients, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks project state (version 3) for a crystal shop and healing services website, noting architectural decisions, a known broken QR code image issue, and detailed image requirements for 19 crystals in raw and bracelet forms.
